summary.lv: Head of Product Delivery amats Eleving fintech organizācijā, vadot un mentorējot Product Owner un projektu vadītājus, pārraugot sistēmu piegādi no prasībām līdz produkcijai un nodrošinot saskaņotus standartus un prioritātes starp komandām.
summary.en: A Head of Product Delivery role at Eleving fintech, leading and mentoring Product Owners and Project Managers, overseeing system delivery from requirements to production and ensuring consistent standards and prioritization across teams.
